title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif interviews Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discussing infrastructure scaling at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies, AI coding limitations, and hiring strategies for top engineers in the AI era.
